channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Capital One has a new tool to help keep track of all your subscriptions
item.description: Capital One launched on Wednesday a free, integrated subscription management tool, allowing customers to track, block, and cancel recurring payments from over 10,000 merchants directly through its mobile app.
item.dc:creator: Janya Sundar, Fast Company

item.title: iPad mini 7 specs reveal 5 potentially annoying limitations
item.description: The iPad mini 7 is now official – and the tablet's specs reveal that Apple has cut a few corners to keep its price tag low.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Preserve Enduring Memories: A Guide to Safeguarding Voicemails and Messages
item.description: Discover how to protect cherished memories through voicemail and text message preservation using the right tools and techniques
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Internet Archive is even more essential than I realized
item.description: It never dawned on me that I might be insufficiently grateful for the Internet Archive. For many years, I’ve used it on something close to a daily basis, including to research numerous articles I couldn’t have written otherwise.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: US agency adopts rule to make it easier for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission has adopted a rule that will require businesses to make it easy for consumers to cancel unwanted subscriptions and memberships.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: AI isn’t really that smart yet, Apple researchers warn
item.description: While we wait for the Age Of Apple Intelligence, it may be worth considering a recent Apple research study that exposes critical weaknesses in existing artificial intelligence models.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI-powered scam targets Gmail users
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CIO Summit España 2024: El nuevo CIO, un directivo transformado y transformador
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) ha monopolizado el interés de la industria tecnológica en el último par de años. Y con razón. Las posibilidades son incontables y los beneficios han quedado patentes con los primeros casos de uso empresarial.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: FTC announces rule to make it easier to cancel subscriptions
item.description: The Federal Trade Commission is taking steps to make it easier for consumers to cancel digital subscriptions.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, The Hill

item.title: Amazon Joins Nuclear Energy Push with $500M Investment
item.description: Amazon invests in small modular nuclear reactors, joining Google's move towards carbon-free energy sources
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's Robovan, Robotaxi, humanoid robots
item.description: Tesla's "We, Robot" event reveals the Robovan, Robotaxi and the Optimus humanoid robot. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson examines the company's latest innovations in autonomous technology.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 5 ways to stop Windows Update from rebooting your PC
item.description: Windows Update can be a pain. Rebooting for updates is one thing — but a forced reboot for updates that shut down your running applications when you’re trying to get work done? Now, that’s obnoxious. Windows Update hit rock bottom in the early years of Windows 10.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Get started with the free-threaded build of Python 3.13
item.description: The single biggest new feature in Python 3.13 is something Python users have anticipated for ages: a version of Python that allows full concurrency between Python threads by removing the Global Interpreter Lock.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: NCSC seeks to expand counterintelligence outreach
item.description: A new national strategy warns that counterintelligence pros have to work more closely with other agencies and the private sector to address threats. The post NCSC seeks to expand counterintelligence outreach first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Mexico says foreign firms have pledged $20 billion in investments, but many are old or uncertain
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexican officials announced Tuesday what they claimed was $20 billion in new foreign direct investment in Mexico, but much of that was neither new, nor completely certain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: It’s your last day to comment on one of the biggest cybersecurity rules ever
item.description: Final comments on a Defense Department cybersecurity rule are due today. The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification project is about to become a reality. The post It’s your last day to comment on one of the biggest cybersecurity rules ever first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: When it comes to innovation and the technology to drive it, few companies today rival Nvidia. The company has leveraged its GPU expertise to become a dominant player in the AI market. Nvidia’s GPU pedigree dates back decades to high-powered processors originally built for gaming systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Countries that have cashed in on their top-level domain names
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Anguilla is raking in extra revenue from registration fees for its .ai web domain thanks to the artificial intelligence boom, but it's not the only place cashing in on demand for websites with distinctive address endings.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: How can AI win the trust of doctors and nurses?
item.description: In August 2023, the American Medical Association surveyed over 1,000 physicians about their sentiments toward AI. The results, published at the end of that year, painted a nuanced picture.
item.dc:creator: Abdel Mahmoud, Fast Company

item.title: How to choose a flexible unified SASE solution
item.description: SASE is at the top of all CIOs’ minds, and for good reason. When deployed properly, SASE, which combines SD-WAN with cloud-delivered security via SSE, enables all users and devices, regardless of location, to securely access an organization’s hybrid network.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to manage generative AI programs – governance, education, regulation
item.description: Generative artificial intelligence has grown extremely rapidly, attracting investment and sparking developer interest and creativity. Companies see generative AI as a route to building innovative services and revolutionizing their industries.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How to leverage APIs for IT-enabled information capability
item.description: In today’s rapidly evolving digital landscape, businesses face constant pressure to adapt or risk being left behind. The strategic use of IT-enabled information management capability (IMC) is no longer just an advantage — it’s a necessity.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Ktor 3.0 switches to kotlinx.io library
item.description: Ktor 3.0, the latest version of the Kotlin-based framework for building asynchronous client- and server-side applications, is now available. Ktor 3.0 switches to the kotlinx.io library for handling data sources. The release also highlights support for server-sent events (SSE).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AMD boosts AI performance in new line of enterprise PC chips
item.description: AMD’s big Advancing AI event in San Francisco on Thursday underlined how quickly the microprocessor industry has pivoted to artificial intelligence (AI) as its main sales pitch.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Army Corps of Engineers modernizes IT infrastructure through hybrid cloud Vertosoft
item.description: The Army Corps of Engineers will complete its hybrid cloud implementation by the end of fiscal 2025. Dovarius Peoples, former Corps’ CIO, lays out where the org The post Army Corps of Engineers modernizes IT infrastructure through hybrid cloud Vertosoft first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: MoneyGram hack exposes customers' sensitive data, cripples services
item.description: MoneyGram, an American payment and money transfer platform, confirmed a data breach that exposed sensitive customer data to hackers, forcing its services offline for five days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Carolina maker of high-purity quartz back operating post-Helene
item.description: SPRUCE PINE, N.C. (AP) — One of the two companies that manufacture high-purity quartz used for making semiconductors and other high-tech products from mines in a western North Carolina community severely damaged by Hurricane Helene is operating again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5
